arguments.command:
cat > /tmp/pip_install.py << 'EOF'
import subprocess
import sys

package = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "data-analytics-helper"
result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", package], 
                       capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout)
if result.stderr:
    print("STDERR:", result.stderr)
print(f"Return code: {result.returncode}")
EOF
